---
title: |
  <center>Searching lost time</center>
description: | 
  <br>
  <center>
  Remeber me
  </center>
  <br>
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "**/index.qmd"
    - "**/index.markdown"
    - "**/index.md"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, author, categories, date, image]
  image-align: right
  page-size: 3
toc: true
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

comments: false
---

<style>
h1, h2 {
  text-align: center;
}
</style>

## 2024

### 01-01
<br>
In 2024, I still like *散步之年* sung by my little airport. 

<audio controls>
    <source src="https://residualsun.blog/audio/散步之年.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">
</audio>   

<audio controls>
    <source src="https://guozheng.rbind.io/audio/散步之年.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">
</audio>    

This is the live version.
